fastfoods.name: chicken burger
fastfoods.ingredients: 500g ground chicken (a mix of dark and white meat stays juicier), 1 large egg, 1/2 cup breadcrums(panko or seasoned), 1/2 small onion, finely grated or minced, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1tsp salt, 1/4 tsp black pepper, 1tsp mayonnaise(keeps the meat ultra-moist)

fastfoods.name: french fries
fastfoods.ingredients: 1kg of potatoes, frying oil( Excellent choices include peanut oil, canola oil, or vegetable oil), seasoning(Fine Kosher salt or standard table salt), white vinegar(optional for preventing falling of the fries apart), cornstarch

fastfoods.name: Cuban sandwich
fastfoods.ingredients: Cuban bread, mojo roast pork(slow roasted pork), ham, swiss cheese(thinly sliced), pickles(sliced dill pickles) and mastard

drinks.name: Mango juice
drinks.ingredients: 2-3 ripe mangoes, 2 cups of water, 1-2 tsp of sugar/honey, ice cubes and 1tsp lemon/lice juice

drinks.name: Dragon Friut
drinks.ingredients: 2-3 small dragon friut, 2 cups of water, 1-2 tsp of sugar/honey, ice cubes and 1tsp lemon/lice juice
